aljazeera.title: Man charged after arson attack on Islamic centre in Dublin

monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Launches Strikes in Southern Lebanon, Maintains Occupation

— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon, Lebanon · 6m ago. Israel continues targeted strikes in southern Lebanon over the weekend and maintains occupation, with Netanyahu vowing no withdrawal while Hezbollah remains.
Israeli Army Blocks Access to West Bank Town Amid Incursions
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 4h ago. Israeli forces block all access to a West Bank town as military incursions continue, escalating tensions in the occupied territory.
Police Arrest Suspect After Netanya Rabbi's Murder in Israel
— S3 · Conflict · Netanya, Israel · 7h ago. A suspect is arrested in the murder of Rabbi Amos Guetta in Netanya, one of three killings in Israel this morning.
